TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2014 CADILLAC CTS. WHILE DRIVING APPROXIMATELY 30 MPH, THE STABILIZER CONTROL WARNING INDICATOR ILLUMINATED AS A MESSAGE DISPLAYED 'REDUCE ENGINE CAPACITY'. THERE WAS A REDUCTION IN THE ENGINE POWER AND THE VEHICLE THEN STALLED. THE VEHICLE FAILED TO RESTAR

narrative.headline: What 2014 Cadillac Cts owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 144 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (58% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
